name: agentmemory-capture
description: OpenCode plugin for agentmemory - broad lifecycle coverage with newer typed hooks (tool.execute.after, dispose, command.execute.before, experimental.chat.messages.transform) plus permission.asked / permission.v2.asked / permission.v2.replied / message.part.removed / file.watcher.updated / session.idle bus events and a user message branch on message.updated. Built-in reliability: per-session /summarize debounce (default 60s, override via OPENCODE_AGENTMEMORY_SUMMARIZE_DEBOUNCE_MS), HTTPS bearer warning, DEBUG-only /health probe at init, tool output base64/image sanitization, env-driven timeouts (OPENCODE_AGENTMEMORY_TIMEOUT_MS, OPENCODE_AGENTMEMORY_HEAVY_TIMEOUT_MS), proper plugin-reload dispose semantics (does NOT end the live session), resumed-session re-injection via /session/start. Two slash commands (recall, remember). One-shot install via `agentmemory connect opencode --with-plugin`.
